original_text: R&D investment intensity remains elevated at 19.70% of revenue in Q2 2025 (K005), with R&D expenses of $610,000,000 (C007). This represents an increase from Q1 2025's $568,000,000 (C014), Q3 2024's $524,000,000 (C021), and Q2 2024's $519,000,000 (C028), indicating continued commitment to product development and platform enhancement. The R&D intensity of nearly 20% is substantial for a mature travel platform, suggesting Airbnb is prioritizing innovation and technology infrastructure to maintain competitive positioning. This investment level may pressure near-term margins but could support long-term differentiation.

changes_summary: Updated all R&D expense citations to match the valid chunk references identified by the fact-checker (C007→C009, C014→C016, C021→C023, C028→C030) to resolve citation mismatch issues. Updated chunk_ids list to reflect the new citations.
